rag_rules: Insert generated AGREE annex blocks into the intended target component or implementation while preserving AADL architecture.
generic_rules: Place implementation-level bindings in implementation scopes after relevant subcomponents and connections.
Use assign only when the left-hand side is an existing output feature or declared auxiliary variable in implementation contracts.
Write guarantees that relate visible outputs to visible inputs for output dependency contracts.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {**... **};` blocks.
Use exact visible identifiers from the current component scope in AGREE clauses.
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in a component type annex.
Do not invent declarations in repair for unresolved references; use exact visible identifiers instead.
